# Lokeshkumar D — Agentic AI Engineer

> Portfolio of Lokeshkumar D (Loki), an Agentic AI Engineer and founder from Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India. He has shipped 4 live AI products and is available for full-time AI Engineering roles, freelance AI/ML projects, and startup consulting.

## Who he is

- Agentic AI Engineer specializing in LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, RAG, multi-agent systems, MCP, and function calling
- Full-stack: Python, FastAPI, Next.js 14, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Supabase, pgvector, ChromaDB, Redis, Docker, Vercel
- B.Tech IT, Sri Krishna College of Technology, Coimbatore (2023–2027)
- Recognition: UIDAI Data Hackathon 2026 (led team analyzing 4.94M+ Aadhaar records), VEL IDEAFORGE 2K26 national finalist

## Products (all live in production)

- Viya AI (https://heyviya.vercel.app): AI life & wealth partner — personal finance via natural conversation in 5 Indian languages, on PWA, WhatsApp, and Android. Python, FastAPI, LangChain, Gemini, Supabase.
- Kaizy (https://kaizyy.vercel.app): India's workforce OS connecting homeowners with verified skilled workers — 3-round dispatch engine, Razorpay escrow, GPS tracking. Next.js 14, TypeScript, Supabase, Mapbox.
- Mentixy (https://synaptiqq.vercel.app): AI career intelligence platform — Claude-powered counselor, live coding arena (Judge0), CareerDNA vector profiling. Next.js, FastAPI, pgvector, Redis.
- KadaiGPT (https://github.com/Lokii1211/kadaigpt): WhatsApp smart shop assistant for local retailers — Tamil/English NLP, automated GST invoicing, inventory AI. Python, LangChain, Gemini, PostgreSQL.
